title: Bee Removal in Ardsley, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Ardsley, Westchester. Safe, humane bee hive extraction for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a quote!
intro: Dealing with a bee infestation in Ardsley? Best Pest Control NYC provides professional bee removal services throughout Westchester County, including all of Ardsley's residential neighborhoods and commercial properties. Our experienced technicians safely remove bee colonies and hives while protecting your property and family.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Westchester communities, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with safe, humane bee removal practices. Our licensed technicians respond quickly to Ardsley properties, offering transparent pricing between $350-$550 and guaranteed results that keep bees from returning.
localContext: Ardsley's tree-lined streets and charming Tudor and Colonial homes provide ideal nesting spots for honeybees and carpenter bees, especially in attics, eaves, and mature trees near Pascone Park. The village's proximity to the Saw Mill River and abundance of flowering gardens make bee activity common throughout spring and summer months.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Ardsley typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size and location of the hive, accessibility, and the type of bees involved. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: Do you remove all types of bees in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Yes, we safely remove all bee species common to Westchester County, including honeybees, carpenter bees, bumblebees, and yellow jackets. Our methods are tailored to each species to ensure safe, effective removal without harming beneficial pollinators when possible.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee problem in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Ardsley bee removal requests. Because bee swarms and hive activity can escalate quickly, especially during warmer months, we prioritize rapid response to protect your family and property.

faqs.question: Will the bees come back after removal?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes complete hive extraction and treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation. We also seal entry points and provide recommendations to make your Ardsley property less attractive to future bee colonies, backed by our service guarantee.
